alert: CRITICAL: Unusual data exfiltration detected. Auth service showing 500% increase in token generation. Database query volumes spiked 800%. Possible credential compromise detected by security monitoring.

auth_service.description: Auth service generating excessive tokens due to compromised credentials. Audit logger down preventing security event recording.

database.description: Database receiving massive unauthorized query volume from compromised auth tokens.

audit_logger.description: Audit logger overwhelmed and crashed, unable to record security events.

ground_truth.summary: Credential compromise caused auth_service to generate excessive tokens. Audit logger crashed under load preventing security event recording. Database overwhelmed with unauthorized queries.
